description: Master imaging studies for MedRPG. Comprehensive ER imaging library.

architecture_notes.ap_costs: Plain film 1, US 1-2, CT non-contrast 2, CT with contrast 3, CTA 3, MRI non-contrast 3, MRI with contrast 4, MRA 4, Fast MRI brain 2, Nuclear medicine 3, Fluoroscopy 2
architecture_notes.delays: Both result_delay_seconds (real time) AND result_delay_turns must elapse before result is shown. Whichever is LATER blocks the result. Display 'Pending' status until both have elapsed.
architecture_notes.iv_contrast: Studies with requires_iv_contrast=true cannot be ordered without IV. If IV present, prompt confirms IV contrast; cost is bundled (no extra AP).
architecture_notes.oral_contrast: Studies with requires_oral_contrast=true add ~30 sec real time for oral admin in addition to base delay.
architecture_notes.stability: Studies with requires_stable=true blocked in unstable states (septic_shock, coma_fail). Fast MRI brain is the only MRI that is NOT stable_only — designed for unstable stroke patients.
architecture_notes.pediatric_only: Studies with pediatric_only=true only appear in pediatric cases.
architecture_notes.extensibility: Add studies to studies array, new ui_categories as needed.
